vibe: Command-center focus, objective, rigid, technical but refined.

rules: CRITICAL: Do not use Inter for headings.
Headings must use tight letter spacing.
Never center align by default; align left for dense information.
Use JetBrains Mono for agent traces, scores, and JSON data.
CRITICAL: Never use pure #000000. Use the tinted Obsidian #0A0A0A base.
Color is for function. 95% of UI should be monochrome. Colors only guide actions or differentiate agents.
No full-screen gradients. Use matte, flat colors.
Ensure text meets APCA standards over backgrounds.

spacing_and_layout.system: Generous Spacing Philosophy combined with Control Room Grid for data.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: 0px to max 4px (rounded-sm) for a brutalist, technical feel.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard_grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-4, tight gap-4. Every pixel utilized. Cardless style, use 1px solid borders.
spacing_and_layout.chat_layout: Sidebar (w-72) for threads + Main chat area. Trace panel can be a right-side collapsible panel (w-80) or inline accordion.
rules: Containers with borders must have internal padding (p-6 or p-8).
Grid items MUST be direct children of grid containers.
Use the 'Grid Borders' surface strategy: expose the skeleton, make the grid visible with border-collapse and border-r/border-b.

auth_pages.layout: Split screen. Left: Abstract neural network image with bg-black/50 overlay. Right: Crisp login form.
auth_pages.inputs: Shadcn inputs. No rounded corners (rounded-none). 1px border. Focus states must have high contrast (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white).

chat_interface.messages: User messages: bg-white/10, right aligned. AI messages: transparent bg, left aligned. Include avatar placeholders.
chat_interface.input: Sticky bottom textarea, auto-expanding, flat design, submit button inside the input container.

thread_sidebar.style: Solid background (bg-[#0A0A0A]), hard right border. Use a list of threads with hover:bg-white/5.
thread_sidebar.typography: Truncated text, text-sm, secondary color for dates.

agent_trace_panel.style: Retro-Futurism / Terminal Look. Deep black background, 1px borders.
agent_trace_panel.layout: Use Shadcn Accordion or a custom stacked list.
agent_trace_panel.indicators: Use the specific accent colors to color-code each agent's contribution. Use prominent badges for Judge scores.
agent_trace_panel.font: MUST use JetBrains Mono for the raw agent output.

cache_indicator.design: Small glowing dot (using drop-shadow-[0_0_8px_rgba(50,173,230,0.5)]) next to response. Label: 'Semantic Cache Hit'.

stats_dashboard.style: Control Room Grid. No soft shadows.
stats_dashboard.charts: Use Shadcn/Recharts. High-contrast lines, tooltip backgrounds must be dark.
stats_dashboard.metrics: Large numeric typography (text-5xl font-black). Label above (text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase).

motion.interactive: Hover states MUST explicitly change background and text (e.g., hover:bg-white hover:text-black).
motion.focus: Focus rings must be high contrast.
rules: Do not use transition-all. Be specific (transition-colors, transition-transform).

icons.usage: Use Phosphor Icons (regular or duotone) for dense, professional tool aesthetic.

auth_background.description: Dynamic abstract depiction of digital circuits with vivid lights.
auth_background.usage: Left side of the auth page, needs a heavy bg-black/60 overlay to maintain the dark theme.

default_avatar.description: Elegant portrait of a young male professional.
default_avatar.usage: User profile settings avatar and chat message avatar.

instructions_to_main_agent: CRITICAL: Apply `data-testid` attributes to ALL interactive and key informational elements (buttons, links, inputs, trace panels, scores).
Use pure HTML + Tailwind for complex overlapping/asymmetric layouts if needed, but rely on Shadcn for logical components (Dialog, Accordion, Select).
Remove default border-radius from Shadcn components where possible to match the Brutalist/Swiss technical aesthetic (max rounded-sm).
Implement the agent trace panel with clear visual distinction between the 4 agents and the judge using the provided accent colors.
Do not use Inter for headings. Ensure Cabinet Grotesk (or similar geometric/grotesque sans) is used for H1-H4.
The app must feel like a production-ready 'command center'. Maintain high contrast and utilize every pixel in the dashboard grids.
